            FROM 
            (
                SELECT TOP(1) p.Id, p.AvgRating, p.CategoryId, p.DeletedAt, p.Description, p.Image, p.IsDeleted, p.Name, p.Price, p.ReviewCount, p.StockQuantity
                FROM products AS p

SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[AvgRating], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[DeletedAt], [p0].[Description], [p0].[Image], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price], [p0].[ReviewCount], [p0].[StockQuantity], [s].[Id], [s].[Comment], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[ProductId], [s].[Rating], [s].[UserId], [s].[Id0], [s].[AccessFailedCount], [s].[ConcurrencyStamp], [s].[Email], [s].[EmailConfirmed], [s].[LockoutEnabled], [s].[LockoutEnd], [s].[NormalizedEmail], [s].[NormalizedUserName], [s].[PasswordHash], [s].[PersonName], [s].[PhoneNumber], [s].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [s].[RefreshToken], [s].[RefreshTokenExpirationDateTime], [s].[SecurityStamp], [s].[TwoFactorEnabled], [s].[UserName], [s].[UserType]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AvgRating], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[Image], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ReviewCount], [p].[StockQuantity]
    FROM [products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = @__id_0
) AS [p0]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[Comment], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[UserId], [a].[Id] AS [Id0], [a].[AccessFailedCount], [a].[ConcurrencyStamp], [a].[Email], [a].[EmailConfirmed], [a].[LockoutEnabled], [a].[LockoutEnd], [a].[NormalizedEmail], [a].[NormalizedUserName], [a].[PasswordHash], [a].[PersonName], [a].[PhoneNumber], [a].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [a].[RefreshToken], [a].[RefreshTokenExpirationDateTime], [a].[SecurityStamp], [a].[TwoFactorEnabled], [a].[UserName], [a].[UserType]
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
    INNER JOIN [AspNetUsers] AS [a] ON [r].[UserId] = [a].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [p0].[Id] = [s].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Id], [s].[Id]
